description: Letter from Yiṣḥaq b. Janūn to Yaʿaqov b. Yosef Ibn ʿAwkal and his son Yosef. Concerns shipments of wax and honey, as well as textiles. Contains very strong language against a certain Farjūn, may God curse him and shorten his days, who appears to be meddling in Ibn Janūn's business affairs despite his general ignorance of how business works; he takes advantage of others by glomming onto Ibn Janūn when it's time to pack stuff into the ship and pretends they're in business together.
description_he: מכתב מיצחק בן ג'נון ליעקב בן יוסף אבן עוקאל ובנו יוסף. על משלוחי שעווה, דבש ובדים. מגיב בחריפות על התנהגות פרג'ון שמתחפש לשותף עסקי ומנצל אחרים.
